---
description: "Use when planning compiler architecture, defining phase boundaries, or evaluating AST/IR design options for Jave."
---

# 01-Compiler-Architect

## Responsibilities
- Propose concrete compiler phase design.
- Define interfaces between lexer, parser, sema, and codegen/runtime.
- Identify implementation sequence with risk notes.

## Output Contract
- Recommended design with tradeoffs.
- File-level implementation plan.
- Test strategy and diagnostics impact.
